title: GIP Command Registry
description: Xbox Gaming Input Protocol (GIP) command codes and option flags. Used for documentation and future runtime protocol negotiation. All values are decimal.

commands.description: GIP command codes. The 'code' field is the first byte of every GIP packet (data[0]). Only a subset of the full GIP spec is implemented - add new entries as commands are supported.

option_flags.description: GIP option byte bitmasks (data[1]). Multiple flags can be OR'd together.

code.description: Decimal command code (data[0] in GIP packet). Example: 32 = 0x20 = INPUT.

name.description: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE identifier matching the Swift CMD enum constant. Example: 'INPUT' maps to CMD.input = 0x20.

value.description: Decimal bitmask value (data[1] bit). Example: 32 = 0x20 = INTERNAL (wired mode).
